content.en:
"With my current strength, although I can't beat the six Extreme Realms among the Twelve Ancestors, I should be able to beat the other six. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He wanted to become the thirteenth ancestor of the Source God Pavilion.

Although the Twelve Ancestors made him very disappointed before, he didn't dare to deal with the Star Demon Source Ancestor, but if he thought about it carefully, it was normal that the Twelve Ancestors themselves were not as good as the Star Demon Source Ancestor, if they made a move on the Star Demon Source Ancestor, it would be a death search, even if they united with other extreme realms to besiege the Star Demon Source Ancestor, the final result would be a miserable end.

After all, even a Seven-Pole Realm half-step Eternal Realm powerhouse like the Infinite Ice Ancestor killed the Star Demon Source Ancestor, if it wasn't for the rescue of the Clothed Lord, she would also be killed by the Spirit Crane Lord, a disciple of the Star Demon Origin Ancestor.

It is conceivable that before there is no Eternal Realm background, forcibly coming out will only lead to death.

Therefore, the approach of the Twelve Ancestors of the Source God is very correct.

It may be selfish or cruel to other forces, but the reality is that way.

If Ye Tian was allowed to choose, if he was not strong, he would not come out.

Moreover, becoming the thirteenth ancestor of the Source God Pavilion has many benefits, he can learn more about the secrets, and even has a huge help for him to impact the Eternal Realm.

......

Genjin Pavilion.

Ye Tian came here and applied to the Twelve Ancestors to become the Thirteenth Ancestor.

In fact, some of the half-step Eternal Realm members in the inner circle of the Source God Pavilion also wanted to become the Thirteenth Ancestor, but they all failed, and if they failed once, they would not be able to continue to apply for this assessment for a long time.

Soon, the twelve ancestors all received Ye Tian's application information.

"Endless Ancestor wants to apply to become the Thirteenth Ancestor?"

Zhenhe Sword Ancestor and the others were shocked.

What realm is the Endless Ancestor to dare to apply for the Thirteenth Ancestor?

"Do you want to refuse, what kind of realm is he, it's just nonsense!" Feng Gu Yuanzu shook his head and said.

"Any member of the inner circle has the qualifications to apply to become the thirteenth ancestor, and we don't have any requirements for cultivation, only strength and background, as long as it is not a force that has a huge contradiction with the Source God Pavilion, we will accept it! "True River Sword Ancestor Dao.

"Then agree, it won't take much time anyway. Feng Gu Yuan Ancestor also agreed.

The twelve ancestors all agreed, and the assessment of the thirteenth ancestor began.

The content of the assessment is very simple, that is, Ye Tian selects three twelve ancestors, as long as he persists under any of the twelve ancestors for an hour and does not fall behind obviously, he is qualified to become the thirteenth ancestor.

Rumble!!!!

In a void space in the Origin God Pavilion.

Ye Tian and the Twelve Ancestors appeared one after another.

"Endless Ancestor, do you really want to take the Thirteenth Ancestor Assessment?" asked the True River Sword Ancestor.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"Then pick the three Twelve Ancestors!" said the True River Sword Ancestor.

Ye Tian glanced at the Twelve Ancestors and said, "I choose the Jinchen Origin Ancestor, the Ten Pupil Origin Ancestor, and the Eight-Faced Origin Ancestor!"

The three half-step Eternal Realm powerhouses he chose were not in the Extreme Realm, but the three Origin Ancestors who were in the weaker strength among the Twelve Ancestors all belonged to the strength of the top half-step Eternal Realm, but they were not too far away from the Extreme Realm.

The True River Sword Ancestor was not surprised at all by Ye Tian's choice, if Ye Tian chose the Extreme Realm Challenge, it would be strange.

The first one to make a move was Jin Chen Yuanzu, Jin Chen Yuanzu showed extremely terrifying strength as soon as he made a move, but he didn't do his best, for fear that he would kill Ye Tian in one move, which would be too faceless.

But soon, his expression changed.

Because, Ye Tian's strength was not weak, and he easily resisted his punch.

"Endless Ancestor, I won't keep my hand!"

Jin Chenyuan Ancestor displayed a Gate Eternal Technique, and each blow hit with the strongest attack power.

Thundered!!!!

The Endless Void seemed to have an infinite number of fists, each of which seemed to be able to shatter the Endless Space.

And Ye Tian also used a door defense eternal technique to defend against the attacks of the Jinchen Yuanzu, and attacked the Jinchen Yuanzu from time to time.

But after Ye Tian fought with Jin Chen Yuanzu, he really realized that there was a difference between the top half-step Eternal Realm and the top half-step Eternal Realm, and his regular combat strength was still not Jin Chen Yuanzu's opponent.

As one of the twelve ancestors of the Source God Pavilion, there was naturally no weakling.

If he didn't use his hole cards, he wouldn't be able to become the thirteenth ancestor at all.

Boom!

Ye Tian was sent flying, and the voice of Jin Chen Yuan Ancestor came: "Endless Ancestor, your strength is good, you have reached the strength of the general top half-step Eternal Realm, but even so, you still can't become the thirteenth ancestor, wait for your cultivation to be promoted to the extreme of the Nine Folds Supreme, come and challenge again!"

"Jin Chen Yuanzu, you are indeed very strong, but unfortunately this is not all my combat power!"

Ye Tian said, casting his Breaking Finger.

Rumble!!!!

The aura of the Eternal Realm diffused from Ye Tian's fingers.

"The breath of the Eternal Realm!" the True River Sword Ancestor also sensed it.

The next moment.

The Shattering Finger was unleashed, and the power of the Eternal Realm Finger burst out, crushing the Eternal Rule with one finger, shattering the protection of the Jinchen Yuanzu with incredible power, and directly pressing the Jinchen Yuanzu's body down a small hole.

Jin Chen Yuanzu is injured!

"Stop, the assessment is over!"

True River Sword Ancestor shouted.

Wow!

Ye Tian stopped attacking and said, "Twelve Ancestors, I have passed the assessment, right?"

"It's passed!"

The True River Sword Ancestor nodded, but was still curious about the Eternal Realm aura emanating from Ye Tian's body: "Endless Ancestor, can you tell you what the Eternal Realm aura emitted by your fingers just now is, is it some kind of special treasure?"

Ye Tian explained: "This is a finger that has been fused with the Eternal Realm, so that I can exert a trace of the power of the Eternal Realm and burst out with great strength, but it will not help me much!"

As he spoke, Ye Tian summoned that finger.

"It's really a finger in the Eternal Realm!"

The Twelve Ancestors such as the True River Sword Ancestor were all extremely surprised.

The Nine Beings dared to fuse a single finger of the Eternal Realm, and this was too bold.

If they knew that Ye Tian had successfully fused a finger from the Eternal Realm in the Dual Supreme Realm, they would be completely dumbfounded.

Although this finger is not Ye Tian, Ye Tian has successfully fused his finger and can exert its power, which naturally belongs to Ye Tian's combat power.

With the help of foreign objects, it is also strength, and the twelve ancestors of the Source God Pavilion also recognize it.

At this time, the True River Sword Ancestor announced, "Endless Ancestor, from today onwards, you are the thirteenth Ancestor of the Source God Pavilion, and we will announce it." "

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded.
